clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand body parts, personal boundaries, and express needs around physical safety and privacy.
The ability to build positive relationships, maintain safety, and develop caring dispositions toward others.
The ability to understand diverse family structures and maintain respectful attitudes toward different family forms.
The ability to recognise abuse, understand personal rights, and seek help when safety is compromised.
The ability to form, maintain, and navigate challenges in healthy friendships.
The ability to balance needs, set boundaries, and communicate assertively in relationships.
The ability to recognise, challenge, and respond to bullying and stereotyping behaviours.
The ability to navigate online relationships safely and protect personal information in digital spaces.
The ability to assess trustworthiness, recognise unsafe situations, and seek appropriate help.
The ability to understand the educational framework and parental rights regarding sex education.

per_run_signatures.competency_name: Sex Education Framework and Parental Rights

clusters.competency_definition: The ability to understand and develop respectful, ethical romantic and sexual relationships.
The ability to understand consent, communicate boundaries, and engage in ethical sexual decision-making.
The ability to understand contraception, pregnancy options, and maintain sexual health.
The ability to understand emotions, recognise mental health needs, and seek appropriate support.
The ability to manage online time, recognise digital risks, and maintain healthy digital relationships.
The ability to maintain physical health through nutrition, exercise, and healthy lifestyle choices.
The ability to access healthcare services and understand medical consent and decision-making processes.
The ability to assess and manage personal safety risks in various environments and situations.
The ability to understand physical development, puberty, and health changes during adolescence.
